scripts.predev: pnpm dev:clean && pnpm --filter @fireline/client build && cargo build -q --manifest-path ../../Cargo.toml -p fireline --bin fireline --bin fireline-testy-load --bin fireline-streams
scripts.dev: concurrently -k --kill-signal SIGTERM -n control,vite -c cyan,magenta "pnpm dev:server" "pnpm dev:vite"
scripts.dev:clean: rm -rf ./.tmp && for p in 4437 4440 5173; do lsof -ti tcp:$p 2>/dev/null | xargs kill 2>/dev/null; done; true
